description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern design, upholstered in deep red leather or faux leather. The lounge features a chaise section on the left and a long, continuous seat on the right, both supported by slim, black metal legs. The backrest is straight and uniform in height, with several loose cushions in matching red and contrasting dark gray, including a corner cushion for added comfort. The armrests are present only at the ends of the L-shape, with a low, boxy profile that matches the backrest. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with minimal visible stitching and no tufting or decorative patterns. This lounge is suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional lounge in deep red leather with slim black metal legs, loose cushions, and low-profile armrests. The design is sleek, solid, and ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: The L-shape and chaise section are clearly visible, showing the arrangement of cushions and the slim black legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chaise section and the low-profile armrest at the end, with cushions aligned along the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the full length of the lounge, with cushions peeking over the top.
description_view_3: Side view of the longer section, showing the straight backrest, armrest, and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose back cushions (three red, two gray) and one corner cushion, all placed along the backrest and corner; single seat cushions run the length of each section.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, uniform-height backrest with no tufting or segmentation; clean, modern lines.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests present at both ends, low-profile, boxy, and matching the backrest height.
attribute_leg_style: Slim, straight black metal legs, medium height, positioned at corners and under main sections, minimalistic with no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid red upholstery with a smooth, untextured surface and minimal visible stitching.
